name: Zulk
summary: A curious young explorer who leads with kindness, asks big questions, and learns from every adventure in Whisperwood.
description: Zulk is one of the two flagship protagonists of the Whisperwood Universe. A brave and warm-hearted boy with a natural love of discovery, he explores the world with an explorer's backpack and an open mind. He acts quickly when others need help, sometimes before he has thought things through — but he always grows from his mistakes. Zulk embodies curiosity, courage, and kindness for audiences aged 4–8.

traits.label: curious
traits.description: Asks questions and notices details others might miss.

traits.label: brave
traits.description: Faces new situations with courage, but never recklessly.

traits.label: helpful
traits.description: Always tries to help others when they need support.

traits.label: enthusiastic
traits.description: Brings energy and optimism to every adventure.

mannerisms: Leans forward when something catches his interest
Unzips or pats his explorer backpack when preparing for a journey
Tilts his head when thinking through a problem

moralValues.label: kindness
moralValues.description: Chooses care and compassion, even when solving problems quickly.

moralValues.label: curiosity
moralValues.description: Believes asking questions is the first step toward discovery.

moralValues.label: courage
moralValues.description: Steps forward to help, explore, and try again after mistakes.

moralValues.label: honesty
moralValues.description: Tells the truth and owns up when he acts too quickly.

moralValues.label: respect
moralValues.description: Treats people, animals, and nature with consideration.

strengths.label: curiosity
strengths.description: Drives discovery and keeps adventures moving forward.

strengths.label: problem-solving
strengths.description: Enjoys figuring things out and finding peaceful solutions.

strengths.label: leadership
strengths.description: Inspires others to join in and work together.

strengths.label: kindness
strengths.description: Makes friends easily and puts others at ease.

weaknesses.label: impulsive
weaknesses.description: Sometimes acts before thinking things through completely.

weaknesses.label: impatience
weaknesses.description: Can rush ahead when excited about a discovery or idea.

signatureItems.label: Explorer Backpack
signatureItems.description: His trusted companion on every adventure — carries tools, treasures, and supplies for the road.

appearance.summary: A cheerful young boy with dark hair, a warm smile, and bright expressive eyes. He carries a well-worn explorer backpack. Clothing is practical and comfortable, suitable for outdoor adventure — kept generic for artistic evolution.
appearance.notes: Avoid over-specifying clothing. Design should remain flexible across books, animation, and merchandise.

voiceProfile.notes: Voice should feel approachable and sincere — never sarcastic or overly mature.

idle.description: Relaxed stance, subtle breathing, backpack visible.

run.description: Energetic run with enthusiasm, not panic.

jump.description: Playful jump — joy or celebration, never danger.

thinking.description: Pause to observe or puzzle something out — head tilt, thoughtful expression.

observe.description: Leans in to look closely at something interesting.

celebrate.description: Small jump or arms raised — quiet triumph, not boastful.

animationProfile.notes: Movement is energetic but controlled. Zulk is brave, not reckless.

imageProfile.defaultPrompt: friendly young boy explorer, dark hair, warm smile, expressive eyes, explorer backpack, children's storybook illustration, gentle adventure, warm atmosphere
imageProfile.negativePrompt: scary, dark, realistic horror, adult themes, sharp weapons, overly detailed clothing, brand logos
imageProfile.cameraStyle: eye-level, approachable portrait or adventure scene
imageProfile.notes: Visual consistency only — no engine-specific settings. Keep clothing generic across media.

story.prompt: Write a gentle Whisperwood adventure featuring {{displayName}}, a curious young explorer who leads with kindness, learns from mistakes, and finds peaceful solutions.

thumbnail.prompt: Portrait of {{displayName}}, dark hair, warm smile, expressive eyes, explorer backpack, soft storybook style

relationships.description: Younger sister and co-protagonist. They adventure together with love, teamwork, playful disagreement, and forgiveness — neither overshadows the other.
Placeholder — friend and fellow adventurer. Full relationship to be defined when canonical record is created.

metadata.notes: First canonical flagship character. Initial creative reference established.
